title: A7MD's Visual Mace+
description: Adds 15 new models for the mace.
body:
# **⚔️ Mace Enchantment Models Resource Pack**
**_🌟 15 Unique 3D Models for Every Enchantment!_**

---

## **✨ Key Features** ## 
**🛡️ 15 Unique Mace Models**

**Each enchantment has its own model and texture.**

**🔁 Compatible with most versions (1.21+)**

---

# **🧩 Required Mods**
To make the custom models work , you’ll need one of the following mods installed:

**🔹 [_Optifine_](https://optifine.net/)**

### **_OR_**

**🔹 [_Cit Resewn_](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (for Fabric users)**

---

# **🕔 Upcoming Updates**

1. **Enchantments Combainations**
2. **Breach**
3. **Bane of Arthropods**
4. **Curse of Vanishing**
5. **Smite**


---

# **🧭 How to Install**

**📦 Download the .zip file of the resource pack.**

**🗂️ Open Minecraft and go to:**

_**Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder**_

**🧩 Drag and drop the downloaded .zip file into the folder.**

**✅ Go back to Minecraft, hover over the pack, and click it.**

---

## **🎉 Enjoy your newly styled maces!** ##
